incorrect_examples.task:
Create a repository named "sample-repo-2" then change the branch protection rules for the "main" branch in your repository to require at least one approving review before merging any changes.
Only use http://github.com to achieve the task. Don't go to any other site. The task is achievable with just navigation from this site.
